text: - #30 X-Ray Feed: developer overlay showing live relay-subscription reconciliation with causes — the Chirp-side diagnostics pane; open, no epic label [...] **chirp#30** — OPEN. Labels: enhancement. Proposes an "X-Ray Feed" developer overlay showing live relay-subscription reconciliation with causal chains, staged in three phases: v0 "Shadow X-Ray" (buildable now, visualizes NMP's discarded shadow ResourcePlan next to legacy behavior — now stale since #2808 already promoted shadow to authority), v1 "Authority X-Ray" (real applied commands with causal chains, gated on #2808 — now closed/done), v2 "Time travel" (record + scrub a session trace, gated on trellis#114 — now closed/done — and NMP#2809). Explicitly out of scope: metrics/dashboards/log views, receipts only. No comments. [...] 1. **Chirp #30's v0 "Shadow X-Ray" is obsolete** — there's no shadow plan to visualize anymore. Skip straight to v1 authority receipts. [...] **17. [Consider — hygiene] Update chirp#30 to strike v0.** The epic declares shadow X-Ray obsolete post-#2808, but chirp#30 still stages it as "buildable now." Edit the driving issue so the two documents agree on the starting point.
